params.name: Language
params.description: Sets the language for the web user interface.

params.name: Hide Success Notifications
params.description: Hides all success notification boxes at the top of pages.

params.name: Hide Info Notifications
params.description: Hides all info notification boxes at the top of pages.

params.name: Hide Warning Notifications
params.description: Hides all warning notification boxes at the top of pages.

params.name: Force HTTPS
params.description: Requires web browsers to use SSL/HTTPS. Redirects http:// to https://.

Database (TimeSeries).description: Configuration for storing measurement data in InfluxDB (v1.x or v2.x).

params.name: Host Name
params.description: Hostname for the TSDB server. Use 'aot_influxdb' for Docker installations.

params.name: Grid Cell Height (px)
params.description: Sets the height of each widget cell in pixels.

params.name: Internet Test IP Address
params.description: IP used to test for an active internet connection.

params.name: Check for Updates
params.description: Automatically check for updates every 2 days.

Energy.description: Settings for calculating power usage and costs.

params.name: Max Current (A)
params.description: Maximum allowed total current. Prevents outputs from turning on if they would exceed this limit.

params.name: Input Controller Period
params.description: Minimum response time for input measurements.

params.name: Output Controller Period
params.description: Minimum response time for output modulation.
